name: Witch Doctor - Terraria
description:
---✦ "Which doctor am I? The Witch Doctor am I" ✦---

Unlike the rest of his kind, The Witch Doctor wanders around the overworld instead of hiding from the exterior in the lihzahrd temple, selling helpful items that can help the Terrarian in their adventure to defeat The Moon Lord.

The mysterious lihzahrd man is a powerful shaman practicer of many dark arts, besides his helpfulness in the art of summoning, he's pretty good when it comes to potions and flasks capable of imbuing meele weapons in different elements, pretty handy right?.not sure if i like this one at all so it might change later... i tried to make him know at least something about the game he's from but im not sure if i succeeded 🥀

Icon image: @mixterart on X

creator: Zerø195
